title: helenium urmenetae
intro: Helenium urmenetae, also known as Mountain Sneezeweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Sunflower family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as colds, coughs, and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, terpenes, and saponins, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Helenium urmenetae can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to alleviate respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
